en: I'm holding to the ground and I wake up
So I get out of bed, put on my shoes and in my head
Thoughts fly back to the breaker
These four walls are closing in
ko: 이 네 벽이 좁혀져 오고 있어

en: Look out to fix you, put me in
ko: 널 고치기 위해 밖을 봐, 나를 넣어줘

en: Since you've been gone, since you've been gone
ko: 네가 떠난 후로, 네가 떠난 후로

en: I'm out of my head, kept shaking Could I be wrong?
Since you've been gone You've got the spells to break it
Oh, oh, oh Oh, oh, oh
Since you've been gone So in the night I stand beneath the battery lights
I read the words that you're saying to me
I can take the afternoon, the night time comes around you too
ko: 오후를 견딜 수 있어, 밤이 너에게도 찾아오지

en: You can know what you mean to me
ko: 네가 나에게 얼마나 의미 있는지 알 수 있어
